Software, cloud, and automation for modern enterprise teams

Build the control layer your enterprise actually needs.

RePass Cloud designs and delivers enterprise software, identity automation, and cloud tooling for teams working across Azure, AWS, Microsoft 365, and legacy operational systems.

Start a conversation See proof of work
Audit-aware by design
Azure, AWS, and Microsoft 365 delivery
AU Built from Sydney for enterprise operations
Why teams bring us in

When the workflow matters, generic software stops being enough.

We work where operational pressure, governance, and integration complexity all collide: identity estates, multi-tenant platforms, cloud governance, workflow automation, and the business systems that glue them together.

Operational systems that fit existing enterprise environments instead of forcing a rebuild-first approach.
Architecture that accounts for identity, governance, audit, and support from day one.
Delivery that reduces manual work for IT, finance, and operations teams without creating new tooling sprawl.
Products and bespoke systems built with the same production discipline: security, evidence, and maintainability.
Positioning

A software partner for operationally serious teams

Not a design-first brochure consultancy. Not a staffing layer. We build the thing your teams need to run, govern, and scale real work.

Enterprise SaaS Identity Workflow automation Cloud operations
Capabilities

Four core delivery areas

We combine product engineering discipline with enterprise integration experience so the output is useful in production, not just convincing in a demo.

Enterprise platforms

Multi-tenant SaaS, internal control planes, identity-aware admin surfaces, and software that survives real operational complexity.

Explore capability

Cloud tooling

Governance, FinOps, automation, certificate management, and cloud operations across Azure, AWS, and hybrid estates.

Explore capability

Identity automation

Microsoft 365 lifecycle automation, Entra ID governance, approval workflows, and HR-to-identity integration.

Explore capability

PowerShell delivery

Production-grade scripting, modules, reporting, service automation, deployment orchestration, and operational runbooks.

Explore capability
Delivery model

How we turn complex requirements into usable systems

Step 01

Understand the operating problem

We map the workflow, the systems already in play, and the control points that actually matter to the business.

Step 02

Design the control layer

Identity, permissions, integration surfaces, reporting, and audit are designed before the implementation turns into a dependency web.

Step 03

Ship for live operations

We deliver something your teams can run, support, observe, and extend without needing a permanent rescue project.

In production

Cinturon360

Cinturon360 is our flagship product: a multi-tenant operational control layer for teams managing customers, partners, internal operators, and governed business workflows.

.NET Azure Entra ID Delegated admin
Visit Cinturon360
Cinturon360
Multi-tenant governance · Audit logging · Identity-aware operations
Case studies

Proof in live environments

Real operating environments, real constraints, and outcomes that matter to the teams who have to support them after launch.

Enterprise retail identity

Microsoft 365 identity automation

Rule-driven lifecycle automation across multiple brands, mailboxes, licences, and access policies in Australia and New Zealand.

2,100 staff managed with zero daily manual IT intervention.

Microsoft 365PowerShellEntra ID
Finance workflow automation

Petty cash processing at scale

Automated approvals, provisioning, reconciliation, and reporting across more than 200 brands and 2,000 locations.

Eliminated a 4 FTE manual processing burden.

Oracle HCMActive DirectoryAutomation
Multi-cloud governance

FinOps tooling for a global cloud estate

A governance layer that classified spend, tracked decisions, and measured savings across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

Unified visibility across approximately $7M USD annual spend.

AWSAzureGCP
View all case studies
